description: Low-level scene graph node. In dali-ui apps, developers use View instead of Actor directly. Actor knowledge is background context.

apis: Dali::UniquePtr< Type, Deleter, typename EnableIf<!IsFunctionPointer< Deleter >::value >::type >
description: Common internal definitions shared across packages. Not documented separately.
Internal size negotiation enums and types. Covered implicitly via layout documentation.
Internal callback utility. Not exposed as a user-facing feature.
Click/press/long-press interaction behavior trait for View. Documented as part of the view page.
The primary UI object for DALi application developers. View inherits from Actor but provides a higher-level API designed for app development.
Selection state behavior trait for View. Documented as part of the view page.
Base handle for all trait types. Documented as part of the view page.
Low-level alignment enum definitions. Not documented separately.
Shared enum types for image-view family (LoadPolicy, ReleasePolicy, FittingMode, MaskingType, etc.). Documented as part of the image-view page.
Internal extension mechanism. App and platform developers do not use CustomActor directly.
Camera preview view. Not included in current documentation scope.
Low-level drawable actor. Platform-tier only, not for app documentation.
Bitmask value type representing view states (PRESSED, SELECTED, FOCUSED, etc.). Documented as part of the view page.
